headline: We cannot promise you returns. Here is what we can show you.
subhead: FarmThru is opening to investors on Birchal. We believe in full disclosure, not hype.
hero_copy:
Most investment pages lead with the upside. We are going to lead with honesty.

FarmThru is an early-stage business. Investing in early-stage businesses carries real risk. You could lose some or all of your money. We will not minimise that.

sections.heading: What we can show you
sections.body:
We can show you every farm we work with. Rachel's Farm in Kempsey, raising 100% grass-fed beef on regenerative land. Bundarra Farm for pork. Collins Wild Caught for wild-caught Alaskan salmon. Paris Creek for biodynamic dairy. Farmer Brown for eggs.

We can show you the Brookvale hub where families collect their orders Monday to Friday. We can show you a supply chain with zero wholesalers, where food goes from farm to hub within days. And we can put every number, every farm, and every dollar into the disclosure document on Birchal for you to read. No middlemen. No wholesalers. Sydney families collect from the Brookvale hub.

sections.heading: What we will not do
sections.body:
We will not promise returns. We will not use the words "guaranteed" or "safe" because early-stage investing is neither of those things.

What we will do is give you every piece of information you need to make your own decision. The disclosure document on Birchal will cover our financials, our risks, our team, and our plan. Read it. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Then decide.

sections.heading: The terms
sections.body:
FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign launches on Birchal in mid-2026.

Minimum investment: $50. Maximum: $10,000 per investor. VIP deposit: $5, fully refundable, for first access, priority updates, and an exclusive Q&A with the team.

This is not a commitment to invest. It is a commitment to being informed first. We can't promise returns — early-stage investing carries real risk.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Clean, understated design. No hype visuals. Hero: simple bold typography on white with a single wide-angle farm landscape. Below-fold: named farm list displayed plainly, team photo, Birchal platform badge. Tone is calm confidence built through restraint. Trust through honesty, not persuasion.
